title: Auto List (response)
description: List of automated trading runs for the current account

items.description: Details of an automated trading run

contract_template.description: Contract template used for each purchase in this run

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the automated trading run

start_time.description: Epoch of when the run was started

stop_reason.description: Reason the run was stopped (absent if still running or paused)

stop_reason_code.description: Code associated with the stop reason (absent if still running or paused)

stop_time.description: Epoch of when the run was stopped (absent if still running or paused)

strategy_id.description: Identifier of the strategy used for this run

strategy_parameters.description: Parameters the strategy was started with

total_payout.description: Total amount received from settled contracts in this run

total_stake.description: Total amount spent on contract purchases in this run

msg_type.description: Action name of the request made.

req_id.description: Optional field sent in request to map to response, present only when request contains `req_id`.
